versions.version_description: This interpretation as a simplification of the chords it includes a capo on 1 and the repetitive riff.

This is a fingerstyle/ chord arrangement of the video version of the song. The melody and bass notes are provided feel free to flesh out the finger picking as the song develops. I wrote the tabs with a capo on the first fret but still in reference to the nut so just use the fingerings as though you were playing open.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
First of all I only get the credit for tabbing this. Many thanks to georgiarose16 
for his tutorial on this one. Check his youtube channel if you like.

So standard tuning, capo 3rd fret if you want to stick to the album version.


[Intro]

[ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   x6


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Words like violence[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]
Break the silence[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Come crashing in[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Into my little world[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Painful to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]
Pierce right through me[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Can't you understand[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Oh my little girl[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
All I ever wanted[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
All I ever needed[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
Is here in my arms[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
Words are very unnecessary[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G#[/ch]
They can only do harm[/tab]


[Bridge]

[ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]   x4


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Vows are spoken[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]
To be broken[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Feelings are intense[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Words are trivial[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Pleasures remain[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]
So does the pain[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Words are meaningless[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
And forgettable[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
All I ever wanted[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
All I ever needed[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
Is here in my arms[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
Words are very unnecessary[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G#[/ch]
They can only do harm[/tab]


[Outro]

(Strum)

[ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch] 

(Till the end)


Enjoy the silence
